name: TGI (HuggingFace Text Generation Inference Server)
pricing_notes: Open source (HFOILv1 / Apache-2.0 for some versions); HuggingFace

auth.notes: Optional HF_TOKEN for private models; self-hosted TGI needs no auth by default

performance.notes: Continuous batching, PagedAttention; 2-10x faster than naive serving

agent_readiness.notes: Production LLM serving with OpenAI-compatible API. Docker: docker run --gpus all -p 8080:80 ghcr.io/huggingface/text-generation-inference --model-id meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf. OpenAI-compatible: client = openai.OpenAI(base_url='http://localhost:8080/v1', api_key='none'). client.chat.completions.create(model='tgi', messages=[...]). Python client: from text_generation import Client. client = Client('http://localhost:8080'). client.generate('text', max_new_tokens=100). Streaming: client.generate_stream('text'). Continuous batching: multiple requests in parallel. Flash Attention 2. PagedAttention (like vLLM). Quantization: AWQ, GPTQ, bitsandbytes. Speculative decoding. Tensor parallelism across GPUs. Models: Llama, Mistral, Phi, Gemma, Command-R, IDEFICS, others. Metrics: Prometheus endpoint. Healthcheck /health.

gotchas: HFOILv1 license restricts commercial use — verify for your use case
Requires NVIDIA GPU for best performance (CPU fallback is slow)
Model must be in HuggingFace format — not all models supported
Memory requirements significant — need adequate VRAM
First run downloads model weights — can be 10s of GB
best_when: Self-hosted LLM inference server on GPU infrastructure
Production serving needing OpenAI-compatible API drop-in
HuggingFace ecosystem models (Llama, Mistral, Gemma, etc.)
avoid_when: Commercial deployment without HFOILv1 compliance verification
When vLLM's broader model support or features are needed
summary: TGI is HuggingFace's production LLM serving server. docker run ghcr.io/huggingface/text-generation-inference --model-id meta-llama/Llama-2-7b. OpenAI-compatible API. Continuous batching, Flash Attention 2, PagedAttention, quantization. Python client: Client('http://localhost:8080'). Streaming. Multi-GPU tensor parallelism. HFOILv1 license (verify commercial use). GPU required. Best for HuggingFace model production serving. vLLM for broader compatibility.
